themes.exampleQuote: Mostly great French pastries — a little bit of Paris in Pittsburgh.
This place was the find of Pittsburgh! Breakfast and lunch!
The seasonal La Ruche from La Gourmandine might be the best dessert I have ever had.
You can call ahead if you know what you want. It is busy on weekends.
Are you still selling deluxe de pistache?

sentiment_summary: Reviewers rave about the authentic French pastries and standout seasonal desserts that make La Gourmandine feel like a slice of Paris in Pittsburgh, with minor friction around weekend crowds and menu availability.
notable_quote: The seasonal La Ruche from La Gourmandine might be the best dessert I have ever had.
